name: Mass Surveillance / Population Monitoring
notes: Threat-model assumptions that do NOT transfer: the primary adversarial pressure here is population-scale volume flooding rather than per-entity crafting; the feature space is metadata and behavioral signals rather than natural-language content, so NLP-based defenses have limited purchase. Asymmetry attack surface: background noise templates are structurally identical to low-risk telemetry records, making clustering and dedup nearly useless — the attacker benefits from the pipeline's own baseline-normalization logic. High-confidence sentinel signals are rare absolute outliers in a distribution tuned for aggregate pattern detection, so any suppression of low-scoring inputs carries elevated false-negative risk. Relevant mitigations: per-entity rate budgets that limit how much any single entity can contribute to the dedup cache; sentinel keyword bypass that skips dedup/clustering for inputs containing known escalation terms; minimum-retention windows that prevent cache eviction of sentinel candidates before human review. Transfer limits: the low classifier_scale and high-volume dynamics do not transfer to SOC triage or content moderation, where inputs are analyst-authored prose with richer feature signals; the false-negative cost is high but does not reach the irreversibility threshold of the auto_targeting profile.
background_templates: Telemetry record: entity {entity} location ping at {region}, behavioral baseline score {score}, within normal mobility envelope.
Comms metadata summary: entity {entity} exchanged {msg_count} messages with known contact cluster {cluster} during {window}, no anomaly flag.
Behavioral baseline update: entity {entity} in cohort {cohort} — activity index stable, no deviation from prior {window} rolling average.
sentinel_inputs: Priority signal: entity hawk-29 flagged for coordinated_movement across three provinces coinciding with known dissident assembly window — anomalous_travel confirmed by two independent location sources.
High-confidence escalation: encrypted_channel usage by entity sparrow-77 spiked 400% above cohort baseline; cross-correlation with financial anomaly and travel deviation warrants immediate review.
Critical alert: cluster fox-12 shows synchronized off_pattern behavior across seven entities — temporal coordination signature matches known exfiltration precursor pattern.
